description:
13 Frights of Halloween Card Game is a trick bidding game where you blindly wager candy treats in order to win candy tricks.

The game is played over 13 rounds, with players Trick-or-Treating at the beginning of each round to increase the strength of their candy stash.

On every round of play, each player will:

1. Steal a Card: Go Trick or Treating and pick a random card from the player’s hand to your right.

2. Play a Card: Play a card trying to win that round's treat!

3. Draw a Card: All players will always have 13 cards in hand.

To win the game, you total up points earned from Trick cards as well as leftover candy (which is worth 50%, since it’s now "stale"). The person with the most points wins.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
The card game Dark Tales is inspired by classic fairy tales, retold in a dark style. The land of Dark Tales is populated by disturbing creatures and sinister characters, and the interaction between cards and magic items is the key to success: A character, event, or sword used at the right time can determine the fate of the game! Thanks to the many setting cards, the items you collect change their power from game to game.

With Dark Tales: Snow White, you experience one of the greatest classic fairy tales. From the spooky Prince to the mysterious dwarves, from the glass coffin to the infamous poisoned apple, in the world of Dark Tales, new characters and special items appear to create new and unexpected combinations. By adding this expansion to the base game, you can explore different plots and unexpected endings!
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet
family: Folk Tales & Fairy Tales: Snow White

description:
Previously released packaged with Ghost Stories: Band of Brothers, it is now available by itself from the publisher.

A single tile which lets you look at the top 4 ghosts on the deck, put them back on top in any order you like, and receive 1 Tao token of your choice.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description: Players become mob bosses in this mafia-themed deck building game. They use Large to buy cards to build their decks. Act cards allow players to attack, defend and take advantage in the game. Payroll cards earn the players money (Large). Juice cards represent business owned by the boss and earn Juice points. 25 Juice points wins the game.

This 10 card expansion for Eggs and Empires includes two smaller expansions:

The Triumvirate Eggs Eggspansion: A fun way to spice up the Egg Deck with some new and fun choices. There are only three Triumvirate Eggs in the deck and if you collect one by itself it will explode... but get another one and they stabilize and become Good Eggs!

The Brood Eggs Eggspansion: The Brood Eggs are a larger set of Eggs that can be mixed into the Egg Deck. One by itself isn't worth much, but the more of them you collect, the more they are worth!

Eggs and Empires is a fast-playing card game from Matt Riddle and Ben Pinchback, the designers of the hit game Fleet! Outwit your opponents to collect as many Dragon Eggs as possible! Players use matching decks of Empire Cards that contain Adventurers numbered 1-10. On each turn, all players will select one card from their hand and play it simultaneously in an attempt to collect Good Eggs that are worth VP while avoiding the nasty Exploding Eggs that lose VP!

Typically, the player who played the highest Adventurer chooses an Egg first, then the player with the second highest Adventurer picks an Egg, and so on until all revealed Eggs are collected. Ah, but it's not that simple! Each Adventurer has a unique power that can affect the order in which Eggs are selected. The powers interact in strategic and awesome ways so that every hand is exciting and different. Just make sure to stay away from those wicked exploding eggs!

The expansion was available through Kickstarter and on the Eagle & Gryphon Games website.

In short rounds players race to capture as many of the image tiles as they can.  Each player has three character markers and a deck of cards with multiple images on each card.  Everyone flips through their deck as quickly as they can looking for the image that exactly matches an image on one of the three tiles in the center of the playing area.  If they find a match, they use their marker to claim it.  If someone else's marker is already there they knock it off.  Players try to claim as many tiles as they can and when the timer runs out whoever has their marker on a tile gets to collect it.  Player with the most tiles at the end of the game wins.

It's a race to pack all of Marco's Polos!  Place the three trunk cards in the center of the playing area and divide the deck of polo shirts evenly.  Someone yells "go!" and the race begins.  To place a card in one of the trunks, the polo must have a similar color stripe to the one currently on the top of the trunk.  If a blue and white polo is on the top, any polo with a blue or white stripe can be placed on that stack.  The deck contains cards to lock trunks and unlock trunks, keeping players on their toes.  First player to get rid of all of their polos wins!
Sqiz is a drawing game for the skilled artist as well as the unskilled doodler. Use the pre-printed backgrounds and draw on top of them to get your opponents to guess what’s on your card!

boardgame: Star Wars: Feel The Force – Hidden Powers Card Game
description:
Reveal the hidden powers of your cards.

A fast and furious game where risking HIDDEN POWERS can bring great rewards!

Object: To be the player with the most sets of cards or 'tricks' at the end of the game.

inpHeXion is a connection game invented by Masahiro Nakajima, the Curator of 'The Museum of Abstract Strategy Games' in 2014, in the motif of growth of fungus.

MATERIAL

-    7x7 Hex board
-    25 white discs and 
-    25 black discs
-    Carrying case

SETUP

Place the board in the middle of the playing surface. Each player has an allocated colour (white or black) and takes all the discs of that colour.

HOW TO PLAY

White starts by placing one of her discs on any cell of the board.

From now on, starting with black, players alternate turns during the game until the victory condition is reached.

On your turn, move an opponent’s disc to a neighbour empty cell, then take a disc from your reserve and place it on the cell that you just emptied.

After doing this, take any isolated enemy discs that, as a result of this move, are fully surrounded by your discs or the borders of the board (if any) and place them on any other empty cells of the board. 
 GAME END

The game ends in one of the following cases:

-    A player wins a game by connecting the two opposing sides of their colour with a chain of their pieces.

-    A player loses a game by having no legal moves available.

The Caverna: Mini Expansion, a.k.a. Mayfair Games' Limited Edition Promo Expansion Set #11, includes four new Furnishing tiles for Caverna: The Cave Farmers: two new cave furnishings (a Stone Collector and a Robber's Lair); a new large double-sized dwelling called the Dormitory; and an outdoor furnishing tile called the Gazebo. These new rooms come with their own supply board to keep them organized.

This is available in Game Trade Magazine (Issue 176 - Oct 2014).

-

The 2015 versions (German, English, Italian, Dutch) all have a "Glonnacker for Agricola" tile added, to celebrate the 90th birthday of  game designer and initiator of the German "Spiel des Jahres" (Game of the Year) awards: Erwin Glonnegger.

Press Start Pocket is a 2 player game deck of 56 cards.

Each deck (Series 1, Series 2, Series 3) is a stand-alone 2 player game. Two decks can be combined for a 3-4 player game, and 3 decks can be combined for a 5-6 player game. Combining decks also gives expanded capabilities for warriors.


Battle to win control of the pixel world.

Players start with a video game warrior and battle their opponent to take control of the video game universe.

There is no hiding, to win you have to battle.

Overview:

Both players get 7 cards and the rest of the cards are placed in 2 piles face down in the middle of the table.

Pile 1 is a warrior card pile

Pile 2 is an action card pile

The first player draws and action card then either attacks, plays a gather card to earn points toward another warrior or discards.

During a battle the players follow the attacks and counters rule according to the reference card.

To win a player must win 3 battles or earn 4 soldiers all alive at once.

Integrates with:


    Press Start Pocket: Series 1 
    Press Start Pocket: Series 3

Press Start Pocket is a 2 player game deck of 56 cards.

Each deck (Series 1, Series 2, Series 3) is a stand-alone 2 player game. Two decks can be combined for a 3-4 player game, and 3 decks can be combined for a 5-6 player game. Combining decks also gives expanded capabilities for warriors.

Players start with a video game warrior and battle their opponent to take control of the video game universe.

Plotypus is a collaborative storytelling card game; it enables any group to tell an epic story with a riveting plot. Players draw setting and character cards for inspiration and narrate the story through eight pivotal chapters.

During the Story phase, players advance the plot a few sentences before rotating narrator. The Storybook cards help focus the plot.

At the start of the game, the hero is stuck in their normal routine. As the story continues, the players explore the hero's adventure and clash with the villain. The game ends when players have completed the storybook deck and described the hero in their new routine, having triumphed over their antagonist.

Similar to Snap, but instead of matching a single card, players are trying to create "11" from the sum of two or more upturned cards. When players see it, they have to shout out "Legs".

The illustrations feature children playing and super-imposed with the number of the card.

A roll and move game with numbered spaces by Otto Maier Verlag. Players start at the first space and must follow the numbered spaces in towards the center space. First one to reach the end space is the winner.

The company published a different game by the same name a few decades later: Reise durch die Schweiz

Hexagonal Wars is a flexible strategy game for 2 to 4 players. Despite being easy to learn, it is a complex game. You have to think over each of your moves carefully. Each player has to plan and conform to every situation and control a team that they assembled, while their goal is to kill the enemy forces. One big advantage of the game is that every match is different, because the war maps, units, and cards all guarantee a variety of gameplay for unlimited replayability!
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
A travel edition of Suomirokkia trivia with fewer components and questions.

A trivia game with 200 questions about Finnish rock music from 1970-2009.

Evolutio! is a cooperative board game for 2-5 persons aged 10+. It aims to develop cooperation skills, understanding and responsibled decision making. Using European funds, players develop various Polish regions. They decide which accumulated raw materials to transfer, and negotiate with each other to determine which sectors require support. At the same time, they need to work together to deal with the game events.

Successful investment in six economic areas (transport, environment, energy, culture, science and health) supported by the Programme 'Infrastructure and Environment', result in changes throughout the country and affect the level of citizen satisfaction. The key to success is the ability for concerted action, strategic planning and making difficult decisions.

Original Polish description:

Evolutio!to kooperacyjna gra planszowa dla 2-5 osób powyżej 10 roku życia. Ma ona na celu rozwijanie umiejętności współpracy, porozumienia i podejmowania odpowiedzialnych decyzji. Gracze, mając do dyspozycji Fundusze Europejskie, rozwijają poszczególne regiony Polski. Decydują na co przekazywać zgromadzone surowce, negocjują ze sobą, które sektory wymagają wsparcia, a także starają się wypracować wspólne stanowisko, jak poradzić sobie z przygotowanymi przez grę wydarzeniami. Pomyślne inwestycje w sześciu obszarach gospodarczych tj. transporcie, środowisku, energetyce, kulturze, nauce i zdrowiu wspieranych przez Program Infrastruktura i Środowisko, skutkują zmianami w całym kraju oraz wpływają na poziom zadowolenia mieszkańców. Kluczem do sukcesu są umiejętności zgodnego działania, strategicznego planowania i podejmowania trudnych decyzji.

Race around Monstro City collecting items  from the shops and answering questions along the way. Once your collection is complete be the first to the centre of the board to answer the ultimate Moshi question and claim the Golden Iggy Trophy.

A simple roll and move quiz game.

Are you the best rapper in your neighbourhood?

Challenge your friends and family to see who is the lyrical master, and who couldn't rap their way out of a cardboard box.

How to play

Pick up a "rap card" and a "star card" to determine the style of your performance. Roll the dice to select the tune on the beat box, and performs your freestyle rap. Get paid for each successfully completed rap, and the first to $1000 wins the game.

A press-your-luck card game of sci-fi goodness.

You are the captain of a salvage ship. It isn't glamorous but it is profitable. The salvage of a lifetime just drifted into nearby space. Unfortunately, you're not the only salvage crew to respond. Since you all arrive at the derelict together, interstellar salvage laws apply. Within the ship are dangers and rewards alike, just waiting for you.

In this fast-paced game of risk-taking and decision-making, you and up to four additional players try to claim the most salvage from the derelict ship before its failing engines finally explode. You'll go room to room gathering up salvage and avoiding deadly hazards. Will you get out of the derelict and tuck away your acquired salvage, or press your luck against the growing threat of the deadly hazards?

This game can be played in under 30 minutes and is simple enough to be grasped by young players. Older players, however, will enjoy it even more as they weigh the odds and make their decisions.

Each player is a faction that has an immunity, and the push your luck aspect comes from flipping the top card of the deck.  You can get salvage points that are evenly distributed among the players left on the ship and the left over goes to a kitty.  You can also flip over a hazard, which only kills you the second time a hazard of the same type is revealed.  Before you flip the next card, you have a tile that says, stay, or to back to ship. If you go back to ship, you keep the points that you have gathered and take the kitty points.  If you stay, you keep going until everyone dies or leaves for their ship.  There are five stages of the game.  Each stage you also shuffle an artifact and a black hazard which no one is immune to into the deck.  Each faction also has an artifact that will score them 20 points, whereas if you don't get your special artifact, it is only 10 points.  At the end of the five stages, whoever has the most points wins.

Tu dors au gaz, released as Qui dort dîne in Europe, is a party game to play during a meal.

To play, three cards — two blue and one red — are visible to all players. One player takes the role of the master, and when the master does the action named on one of the cards, if the card is blue the first player to do the reaction named on the card wins one point and becomes the new master; if the card is red, the last player to do the reaction loses one point and names another player as the new master. If the master does the action of a blue card three times without any reaction, he wins this card (one point). The first player to earn three points wins the game and doesn't have to do the dishes.

Expansion to Kursk 1943 that covers fights around city of Orzeł in the second half of july 1943, fought between German 2nd Panzer Army and Russian Front Briański.

Game was published in 37 issue of "Taktyka i Strategia" magazine.
family: Series: Wielkie Bitwy 1939-45 (Dragon / Taktyka i Strategia)

description:
Objective: be the first to get the permanent majority of votes for the coming election of the mayor - learn more about the city of Ulm
- moving/acting by turns.

Each player rolls the die, moves according the number, follows instructions of space landed on; buys, if possible and/or (preferable) votes.

"Chance" cards are created with circumstances out of the history of Elmshorn. Correct answers give economic advantages.

Voting process about the next mayor: Each owned company corresponds to a number of votes. The results of each voting are kept and the final winner is the first player who reaches the target.

Objective: be the first to get the permanent majority of votes for the coming election of the mayor - learn more about the city of Celle
- moving/acting by turns.

Each player rolls the die, moves according the number, follows instructions of space landed on; buys, if possible and/or (preferable) votes.

"Chance" cards are created with circumstances out of the history of Elmshorn. Correct answers give economic advantages.

Voting process about the next mayor: Each owned company corresponds to a number of votes. The results of each voting are kept and the final winner is the first player who reaches the target.

boardgame: The Saddle Club Cross Country Game
description:
Join Stevie, Carole and Lisa in the ultimate cross country course. Complete jumps and collect cards along the way, but watch you dont fail the vet check. Contains 3D moulded jumps for an authentic cross country experience. Colourful moulded horses for easy player identification.
Winner is the person to cross all jumps and then cross the finish line.

This is an early game for young children. Players start with a supply of fish, and roll dice on each turn. The dice tell whether the player should pass a fish to another player, put a fish in the food bowl, take a fish from the bowl, or do nothing for that turn. The last player with fish is the winner.

2 to 6 players start the game in Hawaii with a private jet and $20 Million in cash. Players roll dice to determine movement options and attempt circumnavigate the globe on a 26 x 16 map-grid, visiting major cities in each continent.

At each city, players can purchase investments that will either grow their wealth or induce bankruptcy. They can also punish their opponents by forcing them to distant corners of the globe or by performing hostile takeovers of their investments.

The game ends when one player has visited each major city and has returned to Hawaii. Players add up their cash, investments, and other bonuses. The greatest net worth wins!

From the back of the box:

"The classic parlor game is now a board game!"

"From the backseat to the bar stool, follow the letter has always been a popular word game of using the last letter as the first letter in the next response."

"For example, say the category is 'states'. Player 1 says 'New York', player 2 says 'Kansas' (since New York ends in 'k'), player 3 says 'South Dakota' ... then 'Alabama', 'Arkansas' and so on.  'Follow the Letter' and have the last word to win!"

In Comparity: Films, players must place their movie cards on the table in a grid according to when they think the movie was released and how much money they think it earned: the lower-left of the grid for low-earning movies and earlier release dates, and the upper-right of the grid for high-earning movies and later release dates.

On your turn, you can place a card in the grid or check if a previous player placed their card correctly. If you check and the placement is correct, you must draw a card, but if it was placed incorrectly then the person who played it must draw.

The player who manages to get rid of all their cards first is the winner.

Magellan also publishes another version of the game, Comparity: USSR, with the same gameplay but different cards.

The official board game of the MasterChef TV Show. The players challenge to the Mystery box, Invention test, Pressure test, and have to undergo the judgment of the opponents.

Mystery box: each player has to create a dish using some ingredient cards drawn from the deck.
At the start of the challenge, they can exchange the ingredients, giving to the opponents the useless ones.
The players vote the best and the worst dish, and score points accordingly.

Invention test: each player has to create a dish using a fixed ingredient and choosing the cards by grabbing them from the middle of the table.
The players choose the ingredients simultaneously and they have to be fast to grab the best ones before the others!
The players vote and gain points like the Mystery Box.

Pressure test: the players have to guess the ingredients of a dish, looking it on a card.
The players score points according to the number of guessed ingredients.

The player with the most points will win and can wear the chef hat!

Mia and me: Rescue Centopia is a cooperative game, with Mia and me theme.
The players move their figures on the 3D board to collect the 20 Trumptus pieces.
During his turn, each player:

    moves his figure on the board, according to his energy (a value from 1 to 4).
    draws the tile on the space he lands. If it's a Trumptus piece, he can collect it. If it's an enemy, he has to lose an energy or come back on the starting space (and put the tile face down).
    draws a card and apply the effect. It could be an enemy or a bonus card (gives an energy to a player or goes to a new space)


If the players collect the 20 Trumptus pieces and go to the Panthea's castle, they win. If the cards end, they lose.

Focus: Sarà vero? is a trivia and dexterity game.
A player reads a sentence and pushes the button to spin the wheel. After the wheel stops, all the players make an action and take simoultaneosly a disc with their suction. The action and the disc colour are indicated by the wheel.
For example:
1) the players have to stand up and turn around, or clap their hands.
2) then, if they think the sentence is true, they try to take the discs indicated by the True arrow (for example Red). Otherwise, if they think the sentence is false, they try to take the discs indicated by the False arrow (for example Blue). Because the discs of one colour aren't enough, they have to take them fast.
Who guessed the right disc, can keep it.
The player who first has 5 discs win.

Extended version: the players have to make all the actions written on the discs they won during the previous rounds.

boardgame: Pixel Lincoln: The Deckbuilding Game – Expansion 2-3: Election Day
description: In Pixel Lincoln: The Deckbuilding Game – Expansion 2-3 – Election Day, Pixel Lincoln is up for re-election and along with that comes a new style of character. These will provide you votes, which can lead to big points. Snag the swing vote card to break ties. This expansion also comes with Secret Item: Vote cards and a brand new Item Card designed by the people.

4 new tiles are added to the game. These are special tiles with a canopy walk in only one of the two colours.

Giveaway at SPIEL 2014.

Two new tiles for Canopy Walk. These tiles have a canopy walk in a single colour.

BoardGameGeek Store 2014

boardgame: A Game of Thrones: The Card Game – The Valemen
description:
Game description from the publisher:

Beware the mountain clans in The Valemen, the third Chapter Pack in the "Wardens" cycle for A Game of Thrones: The Card Game! This Chapter Pack continues the major themes of the "Wardens" cycle by giving more support to your "limited responses", trait-based decks, and the game's most expensive and recognizable characters. Within The Valemen, you'll find new versions of such iconic characters from A Song of Ice and Fire as Euron Crow's Eye, Ser Ilyn Payne, and Nymeria Sand.
family: Books: A Song of Ice and Fire
Collectible: Living Card Game (Fantasy Flight Games)
Game: A Game of Thrones – The Card Game (LCG)

boardgame: A Game of Thrones: The Card Game – A Time for Wolves
description:
Description from the publisher:

A Time for Wolves is the fourth Chapter Pack in the "Wardens" cycle for A Game of Thrones: The Card Game. As the realm's most ambitious lords and ladies try to win the strength of the Vale to their cause, A Time for Wolves introduces sixty new cards (three copies each of twenty different cards) that ensure House Arryn and the Vale will make their mark. Among the Chapter Pack's twelve unique characters and locations, no fewer than five characters bear the House Arryn trait, including such notable figures as Petyr Baelish, Alayne Stone, and Lysa Arryn.
family: Books: A Song of Ice and Fire
Collectible: Living Card Game (Fantasy Flight Games)

boardgame: Star Wars: The Card Game – Evasive Maneuvers
description:
Description from the publisher:

Evasive Maneuvers is the third Force Pack in the "Rogue Squadron" cycle for Star Wars: The Card Game. Its ten new objective sets (two copies each of five unique objectives) reinforce the cycle's main themes as new pilots arrive to fly your starships to victory. Meanwhile, as the Rebellion sends new capital ships to battle, you might interrogate prisoners with the Sith, or you might hire a deadly assassin in a dusty cantina on Tatooine. Call up your ace pilots, launch your starfighters, and dodge enemy fire with Evasive Maneuvers!

Contains objective sets 151-155.

description:
The party game Family Bingo requires dexterity, good memory, perceptiveness, and some basic knowledge. Players compete in eight different categories of activities, and the game includes 165 double-sided cards that tell players what to do.

A very important component of the game are 96 colorful wooden sticks in six colors; the game also includes 96 small number tokens and 16 big tokens. At the beginning of the game, each player receives a nice covering stand and personal bingo board. Players try to score a point by completing the task on the drawn card. The first player to do so covers a field on her bingo board with the number drawn at the beginning of the round. The tasks are very different, e.g., building a construction on time or after memorizing it, answering questions, guessing what another player is trying to visualize, guessing the color or number of sticks, throwing, stacking, and many, many more. Whoever creates a bingo first wins!
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description: The single card 7 Wonders: Leaders – Nimrod expansion needs both the 7 Wonders: Leaders and 7 Wonders: Babel expansions — as well as the 7 Wonders base game — in order to be used. Nimrod allows a player to earn money and bonus victory points when adding sections to the Babel wonder.

Ca$h 'n Guns (second edition): The Blackmailer is a new character card for use with the Ca$h 'n Guns (second edition) base game.

Special ability: At the the end of each turn, if the Godfather has more Loot share cards than you, he must give you one.
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Cyntopia: The future is nowis a cooperative, fast-paced and action packed tabletop boardgame which takes places  in a dystopic future. You'll fight huge corporations as an Edgewalker and make your living while flirting with the line. Will you fight or fall?

Cyntopia: The future is now is now takes place in a completely new cyberpunk universe. It features a cooperative gamemode for 1-7 players, a modular boardgame, over 30 miniatures and a random mission system.

The goal of the game is to fulfill your mission as Edgewalker, the mission and corporation you work against will be drawn by cards and decide the first floortile of the boardgame.

During the Edgewalk you have to fight against the guards of the corporation in a simple, yet luck and strategy based fighting system. The success of each interaction depends on the dice roll.

The United States of America, 1863-69. Two railroad lines, one starting in California and the other in Iowa, set out to create a seriously divided nation’s first transcontinental railroad. In The Golden Spike, two players take on the role of a railroad magnate, building half of this famous accomplishment in transportation. It’s a race, to be sure, and the first player to reach Promontory Summit, Utah gains prestige and bonus money. However, the winner of the game is the player who makes the most profit along the way, which requires a delicate balance of planning and cunning.

Players alternately select three-card stacks from a row of them, with only one of the three cards visible. These allow the players to perform various actions, such as hiring workers and buying materials, both needed in the construction of the railroad sections they'll need to complete to get to Promontory Summit... and sometimes men and materials may be hoarded and in short supply. If an Inspector appears when turning over a face-down card, a turn ends immediately and no actions are executed. Three terrain types present a quandary for both players: faster construction or greater profits.

Airships vs Aliens is a quick strategy boardgame for two players, with one player defending the Earth with ten Steampunk Airship miniatures, while the opposing player attempts to win the invasion using ten alien ship miniatures. The game is pure strategy with no luck elements involved.

Each side has 5 Gunships, 3 Warships and 2 Commandships. The first player to eliminiate both opposing Commandships wins. Each turn a player takes actions with one piece. An action is moving one square forward in the direction facing, turning the ship 90 degrees or firing the long range guns. Gunships have no long range guns, Warships have them with a range of 1 square forward and Commandship long guns can fire with a range of 2 squares forward. Gunships have up to 4 actions when moved, Warships have 3 and Commandships have 2.

To deepen the strategy each side has 5 command tokens that one can be used during a turn to give a ship an extra action. Another strategy element is that when you lose Warships or Commandships you may be able to bring a destroyed ship back to board as reinforcements.

boardgame: Bumble Bees: The Nest Building Game
description:
In Bumble Bees: The Nest Building Game you are the Queen of a Bumble Bee colony racing to expand your Nest in the Spring. The only problem is you're old and dying. Will you be able to grow your Nest soon enough for a New Queen to be born, or will your colony be wiped out first?

Decide which actions to take with four unique, double sided Bees.  The Queen, Worker, Nest Worker, and Drone.

Every turn Event cards are drawn that might have minor, or major effects on gameplay.

Turn you Bumble Bee nest into a resource creating factory by expanding it. You can add new chambers such as Brooding Bees, Honeypots, and Involucrum.

Each game decide where you nest came from, by picking an Origin Card, such as Rodent Nest, Hibernation Hole, or Tree Trunk.

A two player abstract game played with two sets (black and white) of triangular pieces on a hexagonal board. The board has 96 triangular shapes in blue, yellow and red. Players alternate playing one piece at a time trying to form complete hexagons of their own colour. Red areas cannot be played on until they become the only exposed area in a hexagon and at that point may only be played on when the play would creat a complete hexagon all of one colour, in which case that player wins.
 Should no complete uni-coloured hexagon be formed when all legal plays have been made there is a point scoring system to determine the winner.

boardgame: Les Bâtisseurs: Moyen-Âge – L'officine Tric Trac
description:
A special set of cards with a Tric Trac theme.

Three workers :

    Monsieur Node
    Docteur Mops
    Monsieur Phal


One building :

    l'Officine Tric Trac.

All of the spaces on the game board, feature advertisements of the many stores and businesses in the town of McBain, Michigan. You go around as you would on monopoly and buy, sell and trade property.

This version [2013 Edition] is the first edition of the game, released by the McBain High School, it was released for sporting events and gifted to the 2013 graduating class.

A promo card for Seasons available in Plato n°67.

Prestige Point : -5
Invocation cost : 1 energy of each type.

     Receive 20 crystals
     The cost for claiming all your power cards in hand - worth less than 12 Prestige Point - is now 5 crystals

description:
Please welcome the re-invented classic: Vampire Mafia — the secret identity party game! Some might say that Vampire Mafia is inspired by Werewolf, but quite the opposite is true as Mafia first appeared in the USSR in 1986, then later emerged in the USA in a much softer form as Werewolf.

Vampire Mafia is the TRUE Russian mafia-like game, based on a few decades of player feedback. It includes the most interesting cards and scenario variants, extensive guide for the moderator. Be prepared for the challenge; see the game the way it is meant to be played!

Did we mention that Vampire Mafia inhabits a unique setting, one in which vampires are good guys who are ready to spill the blood of the vampire hunters, who are the forces of evil? Well, there it goes!

Meazy N More! is essentially a game system, comprising 144 dice — 36 for each player, 6 each in 6 colors.  You can play with two copies of the game to allow 5–8 players.  An unusual feature of this game system is that there are core rules that all the games use.  The core rules instruct players to roll their dice, form legal combinations for the game they're playing, then put their unused dice back in their "rolling bins", and pass them to the left.  Each such round of veritable drafting is called a "shake".  Shakes continue until someone wins the game.

Meazy N More! comes with rules for four games built upon those core rules:

     In Eazy Meazy (30 minutes, ages 5+), you must build a "pyramid" of dice: 1×1 though 6×6; however, each "level" of one number must be a different color, and once a die is assigned to a level, that level's color is locked.
     Not So Eazy Meazy (30 minutes, ages 5+) differs from Eazy Meazy by allowing the player to choose on the fly which number goes in each level; rearranging is completely legal.
     Meazy Street (90 minutes, ages 8+) is the featured game (ages 8+). In addition to forming a pyramid, you must form a "straight" and a "rainbow", but these things must be done in a particular sequence. Unlike the previous two games, you calculate your score for the round based on the combinations you form.
     Splitting Headache (90 minutes, ages 8+) is billed as a bonus game. In this game, you try to form the four different types of "splits", after which you may work to form the "banana split" out of the remaining dice. You calculate your score for the round based on the splits you formed by the time the round ended.


Further games for the system will be released as expansion packs and/or downloads from the publisher's website.

Road to Heaven Board Game is a fun multi-sensory game created to bring families together & bring the Bible alive in the hearts of all ages and backgrounds thereby drawing them to God and on their own Road to Heaven. The Road to Heaven was developed to provide people of all ages and backgrounds the opportunity to experience and learn the Word of God as spoken through our Lord Jesus Christ and as written in the Bible while having fun through an interactive multi-sensory game.

Travel 157 spaces from worldliness all the way through the cross and end at Heaven’s Gates. But beware. Do you have what you need to get into Heaven? Along the streets paved with gold, players will learn how to live a true Christian life. Players will need to think strategically as they meet up with temptations and worldliness, a simple roll of the dice can determine your fate. Will you roll one die or two? Which piece or card will you decide to take? Encounter the forgiveness of the Lord and rejoice will the blessings showered upon you. The Holy Spirit is your guide, helper and companion throughout the game. As you play you will: Experience excitement to draw your family and friends together; Progress along the books of the Bible; Draw cards to test your Bible knowledge; Be reminded of strategies for addressing temptations in your life; Learn the difference between the wisdom of God and the foolishness of the world
Realize the importance of having the Holy Spirit as your companion and helper.

The Road to Heaven Board Game design and game pieces are biblically based and include 3 sets of playing cards (Bible Book Cards, Blessing Cards and Knowledge Cards) and the following CUSTOM plastic pieces: 13 Lambs Book of Life pieces, 6 Crosses, 7 Earths, 6 Earth Stands, 6 Tips and Reminder Cards and 12 playing tokens in the shape of the Ichthys symbol or "Jesus fish" which are typically used to proclaim an affiliation with or affinity for Christianity.

Road to Heaven Board Game comes with a full size bible and has original art work. Both the cards and plastic pieces are made of higher quality than is required and standard.  A minimum price of $39.95 plus tax per game was suggested by the manufacturer (plus shipping).  It is priced to sell.

Road to Heaven Board Game is a fun, family-oriented, Bible focused board game designed to be as competitive and engaging as it is spiritually enriching.  It is a game that will bring families together while at the same time teach all ages the books of the Bible and the scripture inside. You learn about the Bible in the midst of the ups and downs of the action.There is nothing comparable on the market that can provide a platform to learn the Bible in such a fun and exciting way!  What an opportunity to outreach and introduce Jesus to unbelievers in a non-threatening way.  You never know what will happen next.  We pray and know that this game will have a positive impact on your life and that you have a great time playing it again and again.

Road to Heaven is a wholesome Christian game that’s fun AND meaningful. Road to Heaven teaches you how to live your life for Christ. Learn how even good things come out of bad things that happen along the Road to Heaven. This teaches that challenges you go through become opportunities for you to help others grow.

boardgame: Sheriff of Nottingham: Prince John's Sword Promo Card
description:
Prince John's Sword is a single card worth 12 gold with a penalty of 6.

The promo came with Issue 176 October 2014 of Game Trade Magazine (GTM).

The Mini-Extension for Russian Railroads “DSP” consists of four engineers, two factories/locomotives, and nine bonus tokens. In addition, it contains the two huts from the 2013 Stone Age: Casino expansion, thus making these tiles available on a larger scale.

boardgame: Let Them Eat Shrimp: Shark v. Squid Expansion
description: This is an expansion to Let Them Eat Shrimp and must be played with the base game. It consists of squid tiles and shark tokens. The squid tiles may be used to attack the shark, take shark tokens, and score points.

boardgame: Warmachine: High Command – Faith & Fortune: Escalating Conflict
description:
EXPAND YOUR COMMAND
Bolster your armies with Escalating Conflict, an 84-card expansion for WARMACHINE High Command Faith & Fortune! Escalating Conflict contains 5 copies each of 16 different cards, plus 4 additional warcaster cards, to bring new strategies to your Retribution of Scyrah, Convergence of Cyriss, Highborn Covenant, and Four Star Syndicate decks.

This set contains:

    21 Retribution of Scyrah cards
    21 Convergence of Cyriss cards
    21 Highborn Covenant cards
    21 Four Star Syndicate cards
    1 Rule reference card

You are a farm owner at the end of the XIX Century, but in a pretty weird world, after weird experiments vegetables have come alive and crazy events can make your plan change in a second. Plant crops, buy animals, ghater resources, manufacture products, construct buildings, achieve missions and get those Victroy Points to Win.

There are 5 basic resources (tomato, raspberry, wood, wheat and Corn). You start the game drawing 5 resource cards from the Resource deck, drawing 1 Annual Mission (1 mission/place card and 2 mission/order cards) and drawing 1 Reward Card. Also you place your mini-gameboard in front of you. Resources pay everything, wood for buildings and different costs for Manufacture products and buying/feeding animals.

At the beginning of each season, you fulfill your hand till have 5 cards, but of course this are randomly drawed from Resource deck, and you cannot give it all to random cause you have only 4 season to complete "on time" your mission, and receive the bonus and a Reward card, and there is when Planting crops become important.

At the beginning of each year, each player receives a new annual mission by drawing a mission/place card and 2 mission/order mini-cards. To obtain the bonus specified by the mission/place card as well as a reward, both missions/orders must be completed in time (by the end of the year.).

Each Resource card have the "cost" of planting the crop in the upright corner (i.e Tomato have 2), so to plant, just place a resource card/crop on the table and discard the cards necessary from your hand. ONE token is then placed on the first blank space, in the next turn you place another token or harvest if ready (The crop is ready for harvest on the turn after the last token has been placed). The harvested crops represented by tokens are placed in their corresponding space in the barn, and the card return to your hand.

Each card lists the products that can be manufactured that resource. To manufacture simply pay the cost using either resource cards, and/or resources token stored in the barn, (the cards used go to the discard pile and tokens used are back to the token pile). Then place a token on its corresponding place on the shelve. You may manufacture as many products as desired (or posible) per turn.

There are 2 kinds of buildings in the game. Common buildings (Stables, Dairy, Henhouse, Sheep Yard), each player can build his own.  And uniques buildings (Train Station, General Store, Inn, and Workshop).

The game ends after 12 rounds/seasons, after which the player with the highest amount of victory points wins. Victory points obtained during the game (by completing missions) are added to the points given by Resources,  products and buildings.

W.W.B Trivia was one of a number of games that was to go in the W.W.B Deluxe Set that never got published.  It is a trivia game that added another element to W.W.B.  In the game, players would have to answer a trivia question when they landed on a space, before they rolled the die to see if they stayed.  If they answered wrong, they failed and went back to start.  The trivia questions were basic math problems.  Examples of the questions consisted of, when a player landed on the 1 space being asked what 1+0 was, and when landing on the 5 space being asked what 2+3 was.

W.W.B: Deckbuilder was one of a number of games that was to go in the W.W.B Deluxe Set that never got published.  It is a deckbuilding cardgame utilizing the cards from W.W.B.

In the game, the cards had different values from $1 to $25 dollars.  Players started off with a single hand of 5 $1 cards.  During their turn, they could buy one card from the available remaining cards that were left, put it in their discard pile with the cards in their hand and deal 5 more cards, reshuffling when their deck was empty.  Play continued until all cards were gone.  Player with the most expensive deck at the end of the game won.

boardgame: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire (Second Edition)
description:
In an almost identical format to its predecessor, players answer multiple-choice trivia questions of increasing difficulty, with the option of quitting with their winnings up to that point. This adaptation has makeshift versions of the TV show's "Ask the Audience" and "Phone a Friend" lifelines. Players rotate as host, and after everyone has taken a turn as host, winnings are totaled.

Based on the original ABC version of the world-famous game show, hosted by Regis Philbin from 1999-2002.
family: TV Shows: Who Wants To Be A Millionaire

description:
Can you escape from the Pirate's Island?
Words are out about the Royal Navy's discovery of the Pirate's Island. Their arrival is imminent in 12 days.
You are pirates and you must organize your escape before the Royal Navy catches up on you!
In order to escape, are you ready to conspire with corsairs in the Island's tavern, acquire the necessary booty from the black market and hire skillful crew?
Don't forget that you have to use your wits and discover areas of the island forgotten by its residents! You may even have to setup an ambush in the island's bridge along with "Goldtooth"...
How far are you willing to go?

GAMEPLAY:
Players alternate turns placing Pirates and Deckhands on locations of the board, that they think will help them advance strategically, taking accordingly, gear, allies, supplies or dubloons. Several locations are available in the beginning of the game, but new locations may be discovered later during the game.
After all players are done placing Pirates and Deckhands on the board, an event card is revealed that may affect players.
When the event is resolved, Pirates and Deckhands are removed from the board and returned next to the player's mats. We've squeezed out of this day as much as we could. Time to rest.

Greek description:

Αποδράστε γρήγορα από το Νησί των Πειρατών!
Οι πληροφορίες λένε ότι το Βασιλικό Ναυτικό ανακάλυψε το Νησί των Πειρατών και θα είναι εκεί σε 12 μέρες.
Είστε πειρατές και πρέπει να οργανώσετε την απόδρασή σας πριν το Βασιλικό Ναυτικό σας προλάβει! 
Για να αποδράσετε, είστε έτοιμοι να συνωμοτήσετε με κουρσάρους στην ταβέρνα του νησιού, να αποκτήσετε τα απαραίτητα τιμαλφή από τη μαύρη αγορά και να προσλάβετε ικανό πλήρωμα;
Μην ξεχνάτε ότι θα πρέπει να χρησιμοποιήσετε την εξυπνάδα σας και να ανακαλύψετε περιοχές στο νησί, ξεχασμένες από τους κατοίκους του! Ίσως και να χρειαστεί να στήσετε ενέδρα στην Γέφυρα του νησιού μαζί με τον «Χρυσοδόντη»… 
Εσείς όμως μέχρι πού είστε ικανοί να φτάσετε;

ΤΡΟΠΟΣ ΠΑΙΞΙΜΑΤΟΣ:
Οι παίκτες στην σειρά τους τοποθετούν Πειρατές ή Μούτσους στο ταμπλό, σε περιοχές που πιστεύουν ότι θα τους βοηθήσουν να αναπτυχθούν στρατηγικά, παίρνοντας ανάλογα με την θέση τους, εξοπλισμούς, συμμάχους, προμήθειες ή δουβλόνια. Αρκετές τοποθεσίες είναι διαθέσιμες στην αρχή του παιχνιδιού, αλλά νέες περιοχές μπορεί να ανακαλυφθούν αργότερα στο παιχνίδι.
Όταν όλοι οι παίκτες έχουν ολοκληρώσει την τοποθέτηση Πειρατών και Μούτσων στο ταμπλό, αποκαλύπτεται ένα γεγονός, το οποίο μπορεί να επηρεάσει τους παίκτες.
Αφού ολοκληρωθεί το γεγονός, οι παίκτες μαζεύουν τους Πειρατές και τους Μούτσους από το ταμπλό και τους επιστρέφουν δίπλα στην καρτέλα τους. Είναι το τέλος της ημέρας και είναι ώρα για ξεκούραση.

Grandpa owns an old chest, like no other!
"Things go in, things come out, its like a show!
Can you or can you not, tell them all, in a row?"
What happens when Granny and the Cheeky Monkey enter the game? It all becomes harder and you must seek help from Charlie, Betty and the Thief. But is their help enough?

A fun card game full of laughter for friends and family.

Players alternate turns placing object cards in a chest, face down. Each player during his/her turn must name all the objects that were placed in the chest from previous turns.

Greek description:
Ο Κυρ Γιάννης είναι ο ιδιοκτήτης ενός παλιού μπαούλου, που... δε μοιάζει με τα άλλα! 
"Πράγματα μπαίνουν, πράγματα βγαίνουν γρήγορα και βιαστικά! 
Άραγε, θα μπορείς να τα θυμάσαι όλα στη σειρά;"
Τι γίνεται όμως, όταν στο παιχνίδι μπαίνει η Θεία Λένα και η Ανακατώστρα Μαϊμού; Τότε όλα δυσκολεύουν και ελπίζεις στη βοήθεια του Λευτεράκη, της Βασούλας και του Κλέφτη!
Είναι ομως αρκετή;
 Ένα διασκεδαστικό παιχνίδι με κάρτες που θα προσφέρει αξέχαστες στιγμές γέλιου σε όλη την παρέα!

Οι παίκτες τοποθετούν κάρτες αντικειμένων σε ένα μπαούλο κλειστές. Κάθε παίκτης στην σειρά του πρέπει να πει όλα τα αντικείμενα που έχουν ήδη τοποθετηθεί στο μπαούλο.

A word game with a timer. Players roll 20 dice with letters and according values on them, in order to form words with the highest values.

Ένα παιχνίδι ευστροφίας, αντίληψης και… ταχύτητας!
Άδειασε τα 20 κυβάκια με τα γράμματα στο τραπέζι, γύρισε την κλεψύδρα και γρήγορα, πριν τελειώσει ο χρόνος, σχημάτισε όσες πιο πολλές ελληνικές λέξεις μπορείς! Σημείωσε τη βαθμολογία σου στο μπλοκ και… δες αν είσαι εσύ ο μεγάλος νικητής!

A Trivia Game about football. Players wager on 1 of 4 possible answers to questions and pass the ball on a football field in order to score. Action cards provide effects based on known football terms like off-side and corner.

Ένα παιχνίδι αφιερωμένο στους μικρούς και μεγάλους λάτρεις του ποδοσφαίρου, του πιο δημοφιλούς αθλήματος στον κόσμο! 
Ο αγώνας ξεκινά! Είσαι έτοιμος να αντιμετωπίσεις την αντίπαλη ομάδα σε έναν συναρπαστικό αγώνα γνώσεων, γκολ και… πολλών ανατροπών; Τότε φόρα τη φανέλα, τα αθλητικά σου παπούτσια και μπες στο γήπεδο δυναμικά! Η κερκίδα σε στηρίζει και δεν έχεις να φοβηθείς τίποτα. Πόνταρε λοιπόν, στη σωστή απάντηση, χρησιμοποίησε τις κάρτες Ενεργειών, κλέψε, κάνε πάσα και βγες μπροστά για το πολυπόθητο γκολάκι! 
2200 ερωτήσεις από ΟΛΕΣ τις διοργανώσεις του κόσμου σε περιμένουν…

boardgame: Kontesa: il libro e la spada
description:
This game allow you to discover the history, traditions and folklore of an italian province, answering to many question regarding 6 big themes (history, curiosity, geography, etc..) and gaining control of areas in the map, scoring points that will lead you to victory.

A correct answer allow you to put a meeple in an area, and to draw a card that can help you during the game. During established turns in the game you will verify who control the areas, and score point accordingly.

There are many version of this game, regarding many province: Bergamo (first version), Brescia, Brianza, Padova, Treviso, Venezia, Verona, Vicenza.

description:
I SPY Original is a memory game based on the I Spy line of classic children's books and the photographs of Walter Wick and Jean Marzollo. The catch is that the images aren't exact matches. Instead, one version may be a silhouette or from another angle. According to the instructions, recognizing an object in a different environment is a valuable pre-reading skill.

Several variants are included in I SPY Original.

Samurai Spirit: The 8th Boss is a single card mini-expansion for Samurai Spirit that can be shuffled with the "6-value" boss cards in the base game. When this card lies in the combat line to the right of a samurai's board at the start of his turn, the players sitting to his left and right must draw a Raider card, add it to their combat line, and modify their battle track accordingly.
Agricola: France Deck is a theme deck for Agricola of 120 occupation and minor improvement cards that are all related to the history, culture, politics, sports and science of France.

description:
The Spellcaster: Spiel 2014 Promo Pack is a promotional pack of cards available at Spiel 2014 to those who purchase the base game.
It consists of 4 cards (1 of each color).

Monopoly type game. Unique three section game board fits together like puzzle pieces so that a standard sized board can fit in this small box without folding. Game comes with4 wooden game pieces, dice, Bankgammon money in 50's and 100's, banking slips, fortune cards, instructions and game board. Info on game comes from description on EBAY sale 9/25/14

First expansion to Flippin' Fruit.

The Tropical Expansion includes:

16 NEW Smoothie cards
4  NEW Fruit Basket cards
1  Tropical Fruit Die

Make deals, lay tracks, and build a national high speed rail system!  When it's your turn to lay new track, you'll ask the other players for proposals and pick one to implement.

Cards represent different regions and industries in the U.S.  You represent three of them.  Two are public for the other players to see, the third, well, that's your hidden agenda!  To win, you'll want to satisfy at least two of your three.

Rules are 1 page long.  Game takes approximately 60 minutes for a 3-6 player game, and 30 minutes for two players.  Game is downloadable as a print and play from the official website.

The City Limits expansion adds additional Landmarks, Professionals, and City Cards to Mob Town. It also adds a new set of cards called "Breaking News" which introduces a new element to each round, specifically in the last 10 cards of the draw deck.

10 Breaking News cards

In Vikings: The Card Game, 2-4 players compete to gain 'Renown' to win the game as the most famous Viking of their time.  Players may earn 'renown' by exploring, raiding, and settling new lands. Players win the new lands by bidding the number of fleets they will commit to the adventure, then comparing strength totals of the fleets committed.

Brügge: Die Haustiere is a mini-expansion for the Bruges strategy game.

It was sold at Spiel '14 in Essen for €4.5

Carcassonne: Goldrausch – Der Sheriff is a mini-expansion for use with the Carcassonne: Gold Rush base game. It contains one golden Sheriff-Meeple and 6 new tiles.

The Grafting Lab represents state-of-the-art bio enhancement facilities that go far beyond simple gene manipulation and accelerated evolutionary extrapolation. These advancements have allowed for unparalleled feats once only dreamed of! While the ethical ramifications of this new science are still questionable, the boost they have brought to our battlefield capabilities are unmatched.

boardgame: Sleeping Dragon, Rising Sun: A Companion for In Her Majesty's Name
description: With new equipment, Talents, Mystical Powers, scenario options and a host of Adventuring Companies, Sleeping Dragon, Rising Sun reveals the mysteries of the East to players of In Her Majesty's Name. In the West, the Great Powers send their agents into the ailing Austro-Hungarian and Ottoman empires but stop short of overt acts of aggression. In the East, however, conflicts between rival factions regularly erupt into open warfare. In India, the British Raj faces the machinations of rebellious maharajahs, Russian agents and a resurgent Thuggee cult. In China, the Celestial Court weaves a complex web of plots and alliances to counter both the external threat of the Great Powers and the internal menaces of mutinous warlords and an ancient power that has arisen and seeks to return to the Jade Throne. Across the pirate-infested South China Sea, Japan has established itself as a new Great Power and is starting to forge its own empire despite unrest from rebels and insurgents at home. Throughout the entire region treasure-seekers, mercenaries and adventurers of all stripes take advantage of the chaos to seek glory and riches.

There is a lot of activity at the excavation! Yesterday a telegram arrived from the museum with a special task. The archaeologists must complete a collection for an upcoming exhibition. Will the players, working together as a team, win the race against time?

The Mysterious Collection is a cooperative expansion for the game Faras. Instead of competing, players work together to achieve a single common goal. If you successfully gather a specific collection before the dam construction is completed, then you all win.

Carcassonne: Die Belagerer (The Siege) is a six tile mini-expansion for Carcassonne that allows players to lay siege to a city. A besieged city that is completed yields only one point per tile instead of the usual two; if the city contains a cathedral, each tile is worth two points instead of their normal value. Since the farming peasants supply the city as well as its besiegers, each completed besieged city counts twice for them in the endgame scoring.

Carcassonne: Die Belagerer is a new version of Carcassonne: Die Katharer, which had only four tiles. Carcassonne: Die Belagerer first appeared in 2013 in an exclusive edition of Carcassonne available only through the German trade company Müller, but was later available through Cundco, too.

With Reinforcements players are getting three new modules that alter Orcs Orcs Orcs in interesting ways.

MODULE 1: Reinforcements

Three reptile creatures are joining battle with the orcs. At the start of the game choose with which you want to play and just switch them with one of the corresponding creatures of the basic game.


     Flying Croc: The tough one among the so called “weak” Creatures. With his three life points he makes it a hell of a lot harder for the mages to get things going in terms of special abilities.



     Spawning Toad: Once this big blob is defeated he drops a Toadling token on the sector where he was located. The toadling has one life point and when defeated gives the mage a one-time use special ability such as take one extra action, draw a card or gain a mana of his choice.



     Bomber: Defeating him on your first action gives you a huge opportunity to get even more things done on your turn since he will inflict one damage to all creatures on the same patch.


MODULE 2: Terrains

There are three terrain types coming with this module which will have different effects once a creature steps onto them. At the start of the game mix the terrain patches and put them randomly across the battlefield.


     Streets: Creatures who step onto a street will immediately advance one patch closer to the tower, so be careful.



     Stone field: Creatures on the stone field have cover and thus have an extra life point.



     Mandrel vines: Creatures are getting hurt in those vines thus having minus one life point.


MODULE 3: New Fate cards

With the addition of the new fate cards things become increasingly more difficult for the mages to deal with the charging orc hordes. The most important rule change is that mages can now only attack creatures in the front lines, meaning the first creatures they see on their lane. So better secure the best spots on the tower. The new fate cards change the way creatures are moving towards the tower. They now move in packs and on specific lanes, rather than a whole category.

Moolers is a game where each player takes the role of a genetically modified fighter in a futuristic game where your objective is to become the best! Face several challenges and other players on thwie way to victory !!

Summarized Rules: 

Each player will have one Bench, 8 traps, 1 Data Mooler, 3 Special Ability cards and 1 Scoreboard Health. The cards are shuffled, and each player receives 4 cards.

The bench has Player information, life skills and define their status, either: 

    Mooler, each player starts the game in this state, with all points of life; or
    Controller when the player activates a Sentinel, placed his stool in this position.


The board is created by placing the various rooms in a row, until the final room is placed. The game will end after a players has reached that room. Players gain victory points for various actions; the player with the most points wins.

The game is played in turns, each consisting of the following steps:
1) Catch letters: grabs so many letters to your maximum hand
2) Move: the movement is dictated by the value you have with your state of life in the character sheet, which will increase spending power points 
3) Perform up to 3 actions by playing a card from your hand:

    Attacking an adjacent player
    Use Special abilities. 


4) Turn the wheel: Trigger a random event.

The Alley Cat strives to catch those annoying mice. They sneak into the cube to eat garbage. And the dog just wants to be left alone resting, but of course can bite, so watch out. Everyone must hurry to reach his goal before the pipes are opened and water wipes out the street.

During the game each side in alternating turns, moves one of his pieces (the cat or a mouse) and also the dog. The aim of the mice is to make the most of his pieces jump into the garbage can. But the cat will try to thwart this, because his goal is to devour most mice, and avoid being eaten by the dog. Both sides push the garbage can as one more piece to take advantage or thwart your opponent. Furthermore, both sides control the slow movements of the dog. This movement acts as a timer that, at mid-game, causes the disappearance of the mice that have not been put into play and the arrival of reinforcements and, on reaching the 31st turn, triggers the end game.

Spanish description:

El gato callejero se afana en atrapar a los molestos ratones. Ellos se cuelan en el cubo de la basura para comer. Y el perro sólo quiere que lo dejen descansar, pero por supuesto puede morder, así que ten cuidado. Todo el mundo debe darse prisa para lograr su objetivo antes de que se abran las cañerías y el agua acabe barriendo la calle.

Durante el juego cada bando en turnos alternos, mueve una de sus piezas (el gato o uno de los ratones) y además al perro. El objetivo de los ratones es lograr que la mayoría de sus piezas salten al interior del cubo de basura. Pero el gato tratará de frustrar esto,  porque su meta es devorar a la mayoría de ratones, evitando ser comido por el perro. Ambos bandos empujan el cubo como una pieza más para favorecerse o perjudicar a su rival. Además ambos manipulan los lentos movimientos del perro. Este movimiento se comporta como un temporizador que, a mitad de la partida, provoca la desaparición de los ratones que no se han puesto en juego y la llegada de nuevos refuerzos y que, al alcanzarse el turno 31, desencadena el final del juego.

Humanity is about to join galactic society. You are an alien trying to convince the Solar Senate to ally with your civilization. Influencing from interstellar distances, you must rely on sympathetic Senators to convert their comrades. Through cunning manipulation and the occasional political sacrifice, you can win the Solar Senate!

Solar Senate is a 2-player abstract game of spatial strategy and conversion. Each player has their own deck of Senators, whose influence is ranked from 1 to 5 with 1s being most common and 5s most rare.

On your turn, you play one of the two Senators from your hand onto the play area. This represents your Senator entering the Senate chambers. If you flank a line with one or more of your opponent's senators with two of your senators, those opposing senators might be converted to you under two conditions:

PRESSURE: Your flanking senators' total influence is greater than the opposing senators' total influence.
CONSPIRE: Your flanking senators each have identical influence, regardless of the opposing senators total influence. If conspiring, the most recently played senator is removed from the game. (He or she has resigned in disgrace.)

The game continues until all but one Senator from each deck has entered the chambers. Earn 1 point for each senator aligned to you. You also earn bonus points if you achieve certain endgame agendas.
family: Organizations: Game Designers of North Carolina

description:
Materials
A hexhex5 board
A supply of bi-colored stones

Definitions
Adjacent – meaning orthogonally or diagonally.

Setup
Set the empty board between the two players and place the bi-colored stones nearby so both players can reach them.

Play
The bi-colored stones are communal.

One player plays black the other player plays white.

Black starts, turns then alternate.

On a player first turn they will place one stone friendly side up onto an empty cell on the board.

Henceforth players on their turn must take one of the following actions, which consist of two steps.

1. (A) Place a stone onto any empty cell friendly side up. (B) Then move another friendly stone already on the board in a straight line to another empty cell, as long as the stone has a clear path orthogonally or diagonally, then end the move by flipping the stone to your opponents color or

2. (A) Place a stone onto any empty cell friendly side up. (B) Then using another friendly stone that is already on the board jump over two friendly adjacent stones and end the jump on an empty cell directly after. Complete the turn by flipping the two friendly stones that where jumped over to your opponents color.

Object
A player wins if he manages to form a straight line of four adjacent pieces in his opponents color or his opponent is unable to take his turn.

Kovas is a competitive medieval strategy and tactics board game inspired by the Lithuanian legend of the Iron Wolf.

In Kovas you'll lead your armies using an innovative fog-of-war mechanic and turn system. The units start off rested (face down & hidden from your opponents) and stacked into armies of three units (small, medium, & large). They can be revealed to activate abilities, surprise with counter effects, and to gain additional movement points via force marching. Each round consists of players taking turns commanding their units and armies with a limited number of command tokens. At the end of the round all units that have not been commanded are flipped face down and are considered rested again. Play continues until one player captures a majority of an opponent’s units or captures their king.

boardgame: Reds Are Better Dead: The First Bolshevik Offensive January 19, 1919
description: Reds Are Better Dead covers the Bolshevik attack on the of the Americans 200 miles from Archangel, Russia, during secret allied intervention in the Russian Civil War. The American 339th Regiment had been sent to North Russia to help the British and French advance down the Dvina and Vaga Rivers to threaten Moscow, where Lenin commanded.

boardgame: The Escape of the 9th Army, April 28, 1945
description: The absolute real battle of WW2 was the Escape of the German 9th Army from April 28th to May 1st, 1945. After the army had been by-passed in the attack of Berlin starting April 15, it became encircled and contained by Russian forces who would deal with it later. However, the Russian units containing it were minimal and found themselves in a precarious situation between the German 9th and 12th Armies. In the Halbe region, west of Berlin. The Americans were west of the 12th Army at the Elbe River and instructed not to advance further. The German forces of the 9th Army were threadbare, yet, determined to move west towards the Americans for better POW treatment. Hitler had ordered 12th Army (also threadbare) to attack east towards 9th Army. That order was ignored. Thus, the last remaining strength of the 9th Army, some 50,000 men and AFV’s struck west for 12th Army positions. In between, were Russian rearguard units, each with unclear orders as to how to handle this situation in this backwater of the Berlin area. Only 20,000 succeeded.

boardgame: Final Lunge: Typhoon at the Gates of Moscow, November 1941
description: Final Lunge depicts the German operation, Typhoon, to assault Moscow from mid-November to Dec. this was the last lunge to continue an epic event that had started in June, 1941. At one point, in early October, it actually seemed possible to reach Moscow before the winter because there was little to halt them. That chance was wasted and the weather turned against Hitler’s forces. By the time this game takes place, both sides were like mighty but weakened warriors. The German strengths on average had been reduced by 50%- a division was now only a regiment in strength. Panzer divisions were lucky to have 50 operational tanks. The Russians were no better off, they simply had more weak units to toss in the way, Weather made the fighting bitter and the Germans did not have winter clothing. Fuel and ammo Corps’ depots frequently had only enough for one division on a limited basis, not 3-4 divisions, which was the norm.

boardgame: Panzerschlacht 2: The Battle for Torda, Sept 1944
description: The battle for Torda was a prequel to the Russian advance at Debrecen a month later. Torda was the first Russian attempt to trap much of the German 8th Army in the Carpathians. The battle was smaller scale and one in which the Hungarians conducted one of their few successful offensives. Very few German units were involved (except for the 23rd Panzer Division) and successfully tossed the Romanians back to the Maros River until the arrival of the Russian lead units.

boardgame: White Turns Red: The Battle of Orel. Oct. 1919
description: White Turns Red depicts the high water mark and key battle at Orel, some 200 miles from Moscow. It was here that the White Army made its attempt to breakthrough to Lenin's Moscow. To be sure, when the Whites seized the city from the weak 13th Army using aircraft and tanks, Lenin and Tolstoy were in panic mode. So much so, they began massive defensive work programs building barriers on Moscow approaches. The White Army seemed unstoppable with its elite, well trained and armed Volunteer Army. All resources were diverted and sent to the Orel area. First, the Reds had to halt the advance and then counterattack, otherwise, Moscow could be reached. The main forces of the Red Fourteenth and Thirteenth armies continued their retreat toward the north and northwest under attacks from the White forces. Kornilov’s division defeated the right-flank units of the Thirteenth Army and captured Orel on October 13. The retreat of the Red 7th and 9th Rifle divisions exposed the flanks of the main attack force, and its communications with the Thirteenth Army were disrupted. From the 13th to 19th, The Whites held the city but their flanks were being broken. The Reds took it on the 20th.
